title: alternanthera nodifera
intro: Alternanthera nodifera, also known as the alternate joyweed or spreading joyweed, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Alternanthera nodifera is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its leaves are also used to make a poultice for topical application.
